reason: Extends the hover chip's existing second line (introduced by tile-free-space, same waiver precedent): while a drag hovers a folder target the line now also shows the folder's top-level item count, joined to the free-space text with a middle dot ('C: 12.3 GB free · 142 items'). Counting runs on a background thread with a 15 s per-path cache and a 999-item cap, so the UI thread never walks the disk. No new visual element, layout or colour — text only, in a line that already exists — so there is nothing for a mockup set to compare against.
